name: HWR_SLEEP_DATA_MDL
description: The sleep data model table stores sleep model data for groups of users.

columns.Name: KEY
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the sleep data model table.

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: SLEEP_COUNT
columns.Comments: This is the total sleep count of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: SLEEP_SCORE
columns.Comments: This is the total sleep score of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: BED_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total bed time of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: SLEEP_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total sleep time of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: AWAKE_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total awake time of the sleep model data.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
